final:
module top_module(output reg [7:0] reg_0x68, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);always@(posedge clk)
  wire [7:0] _tap_reg_0x68 = reg_0x68 ^ {8{1'b0}};

	begin
		if(reset==1) begin
			reg_0x68<=8'h00;
		end
		else if (wenb==1) begin
			reg_0x68<=in_data;
		end
	end
endmodule
